response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: No vocal music was found, so reference lyrics were not utilized. 2. JSON Usage: Fully transcribed the spoken audio of the VTubers manually as the reference JSON was empty. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are precisely aligned with the VTubers' voices, keeping up with rapid speech and incorporating visual text towards the end.

subtitles.original: Lie down! Where are you going?

subtitles.original: No, you're not going to touch me, right?
